description: Open the architectural floorplan file at '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan.dxf' and add GIS reference layers and annotations. Create a 'GIS_BOUNDARY' layer (Red) containing a closed rectangle from (0,0) to (1500,1000). Create a 'GIS_REFERENCE' layer (Cyan) containing a crosshair centered at (750,500) consisting of a horizontal line from (650,500) to (850,500) and a vertical line from (750,400) to (750,600). Create a 'GIS_LABELS' layer (Green) with the following text annotations: 'PARCEL ID: 12-045-0023' at (50, 1050) with height 25, 'COORDINATE SYSTEM: NAD83' at (50, 1100) with height 20, and 'PREPARED BY: GIS DEPT' at (50, 1150) with height 20. Save the modified drawing to '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan_gis.dxf'.
